function.name: pay_invoice
function.description: Pay an invoice via the Payment Service (mock auth). Backed by POST /payments. CALL ONLY after an explicit prior {confirm: true} from the client for the pending plan — approval from the Policy Agent is NOT confirmation. Returns payment_id, confirmation code, amount_cents, fee_cents, and receipt_message.

biller_id.description: The biller tenant for the current portal session (partition key).

invoice_id.description: The invoice to pay, from the confirmed plan.

method.description: Payment method from the confirmed plan; must be one of the biller's configured payment_methods.

payer_account_id.description: The PayerAccount id if the payer has an account in session; null for guest pay.

scheduled_for.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) to schedule the payment for, from the confirmed plan's 'when'; null to pay immediately. Future-dated plans MUST pass this — omitting it executes the payment now.

idempotency_key.description: Stable unique key for this confirmed payment attempt. Reuse the same key when retrying after a timeout or transient failure.
